requirements.expected: Owner approval and Sol-approved plan hash are frozen before feature work.
requirements.failure: Plan approval, commit, hash, or Sol verdict is missing or drifts.

requirements.expected: Every normative requirement has one owner packet and evidence mapping.
requirements.failure: Unknown, duplicate, unowned, or silently excluded requirement.

requirements.expected: Exact reviewed tree is pushed; only deterministic identifiers finalize closure.
requirements.failure: Unresolved P0/P1 or semantic post-review change.

requirements.expected: Untouched upstream 83da59f runs as the experimental Control.
requirements.failure: Dirty checkout or unpinned command/environment.

requirements.expected: Candidate compatibility fallback conforms behaviorally to frozen Control.
requirements.failure: Unexplained output, failure, network, frame, transcript, or latency difference.

requirements.expected: Cheapest Control mode is selected by frozen pre-outcome rules.
requirements.failure: Gold data or observed outcomes influence routing.

requirements.expected: Versioned raw schemas and deterministic evaluator produce every gate.
requirements.failure: Null, unpaired, denominator-free, or summary-only evidence passes.

requirements.expected: Latency/resource gates use frozen repeats and jitter formula.
requirements.failure: Single-run or post-outcome noise allowance.

requirements.expected: Development and confirmatory source families are assigned and sealed before metric-changing work.
requirements.failure: Family leakage, late assignment, or outcome-exposed cohort reuse.

requirements.expected: Canonical docs, metadata, claims, CI, and maintenance release are coherent.
requirements.failure: Version/claim/history drift or untested release metadata.

requirements.expected: Bundle contains exactly intended runtime files and is under 250 KB.
requirements.failure: Build helper, ignore file, docs, wheel, model, or duplicate SKILL enters artifact.

requirements.expected: Tier A install/update/invoke/rollback/purge/uninstall procedures pass.
requirements.failure: Advertised environment lacks reproducible passing evidence.

requirements.expected: Acquisition result and normalized failure taxonomy are stable and observable.
requirements.failure: Adapter-specific errors or invented exit/warning behavior leak.

requirements.expected: Default attempt stays first; only eligible failures use bounded retry and itag 18 last.
requirements.failure: Ordinary-path change, retry storm, or 360p preference.

requirements.expected: Explicit cookie browser/profile is validated and completely redacted.
requirements.failure: Implicit cookie use or secret/profile leakage.

requirements.expected: Caption language/order and JSON3/anti-429 fallback improve coverage reproducibly.
requirements.failure: Wrong language/order or ordinary caption regression.

requirements.expected: Fathom remains deferred outside v1.
requirements.failure: Fathom evaluation or runtime ships without owner amendment.

requirements.expected: Every transcript source returns the normalized result/state contract.
requirements.failure: Backend-specific semantics or unsafe exhaustion.

requirements.expected: Same-basename VTT/SRT sidecars precede all ASR and normalize timestamps/language.
requirements.failure: Unnecessary ASR call or malformed sidecar silently trusted.

requirements.expected: Configured loopback OpenAI-compatible server supports :8082 with no remote auto-probe.
requirements.failure: Non-loopback probe, silent upload, or bad fallback.

requirements.expected: YAP is detected as optional local fallback and emits timestamped normalized output.
requirements.failure: Automatic install, user nagging, or unlabeled/invalid output.

requirements.expected: Groq/OpenAI share bounded Adapter behavior and require explicit authorized transmission.
requirements.failure: Earlier success still uploads, keys leak, or retries are unbounded.

requirements.expected: Slash/config/internal option mapping and JSON diagnostics are consistent across hosts.
requirements.failure: Competing CLI or host-specific silent behavior.

requirements.expected: Focused requests extract only allowed audio range and restore absolute timestamps.
requirements.failure: Out-of-range upload/inference or timestamp drift beyond bound.

requirements.expected: Silence-aware chunks, bounded retries, and receipts avoid successful reprocessing.
requirements.failure: Chunk loss, duplicate work, or retry exhaustion ambiguity.

requirements.expected: Evidence state is atomic, owner-only, bounded, private, verifiable, and purgeable.
requirements.failure: Corruption trusted, secret retained, race loss, or unbounded cache.

requirements.expected: Portable bundles use relative checksummed schemas and deterministic replay.
requirements.failure: Unsafe path, secret/media inclusion, alteration, or replay drift.

requirements.expected: Question and Evidence budget reach compiler unambiguously with Candidate fallback.
requirements.failure: Shell quoting loss, missing provenance, or unreachable fallback.

requirements.expected: Progressive verification expands only affected Evidence spans when sufficiency fails.
requirements.failure: Unbounded/global expansion or false sufficiency silently drops an obligation.

requirements.expected: Frame and table mining remains reachable and grounded after compiler changes.
requirements.failure: On-screen-only facts become unreachable or uncited.

requirements.expected: Conflicting claims are reconciled with both timestamps and primary evidence.
requirements.failure: Candidate repeats one conflicting claim without disclosure.

requirements.expected: Repeated Questions reuse only a verified Scout index without reopening all media.
requirements.failure: Stale/unverified reuse or unnecessary full-media work.

requirements.expected: Dependency-free lexical retrieval preserves exact names, numbers, timestamps, and negation.
requirements.failure: Exactness fixture regression.

requirements.expected: Coverage and temporal obligations preserve summaries and before/after evidence.
requirements.failure: Top-k omission or isolated transition frame.

requirements.expected: Frozen semantic fixtures and uncertainty trigger identify measured leverage.
requirements.failure: Semantic work runs eagerly or on unsupported classes.

requirements.expected: Optional local semantic Adapter is isolated, versioned, private, and fail-open.
requirements.failure: Mandatory model/download or lexical fallback regression.

requirements.expected: Optional remote semantic Adapter requires explicit configuration and accounts all transmission/cost.
requirements.failure: Implicit remote call or missing total-system accounting.

requirements.expected: Fusion terms and OCR evaluation survive only if they improve the Pareto frontier.
requirements.failure: Uninspectable confidence, losing term retained, or OCR runtime promoted from proxy alone.

requirements.expected: Dependency-free vision fixture/harness covers required visual event classes.
requirements.failure: Proxy-only or biased timestamps presented as general evidence.

requirements.expected: FFmpeg/stdlib scorer policies promote only with quality/recall/token gain and no regressions.
requirements.failure: OpenCV/PySceneDetect entry or losing signal retained.

requirements.expected: The pre-development confirmatory seal is verified before one authorized opening.
requirements.failure: Reserve opens with changed family assignment or missing access history.

requirements.expected: Semantic grader is validated against dual human judgments before use.
requirements.failure: Unvalidated model judge controls release.

requirements.expected: Frozen Candidate receives exactly one valid sealed confirmatory evaluation.
requirements.failure: Outcome leakage, retuning on reserve, or unsupported claim.

requirements.expected: v1 tag, artifact, changelog, limits, raw data, and rollback verify after all gates.
requirements.failure: Release without complete matrix/evidence or public visibility authorization.
requirements.gate: final Sol audit and release verification

requirements.expected: Every shipped mechanism records origin, disposition, license, and public credit.
requirements.failure: Missing user/repo attribution or copied code without revision/license record.

packets.title: Measurement evaluator, schemas, jitter, and corpus seal
Confirmatory seal verification and authorized opening
Release assembly and final Sol audit
